revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''Mean time between failures 5-1-040

Acronym: MTBF 

The total measured operating time of a population of repairable equipments divided by the total number of failures within this population. MTBF is generally determined during the constant-failure-rate period.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Mean time between failures}}
